description: Monitors INFORM, HDX, WFP, ACLED signals; generates early warning bulletins for high-risk countries.

tools.name: ingest_hdx_datasets
tools.description: Pull latest priority humanitarian datasets from HDX

tools.name: compute_crisis_scores
tools.description: Compute humanitarian crisis probability scores for countries

tools.name: match_causal_patterns
tools.description: Match indicators against CausalPattern library for humanitarian patterns

tools.name: generate_early_warning_bulletin
tools.description: Generate the daily humanitarian early warning bulletin

system_prompt: You are a humanitarian early warning analyst. Daily: (1) ingest HDX/INFORM/WFP/ACLED data, (2) compute crisis probability scores, (3) identify co-occurring Layer 1-3 indicators, (4) match crisis precursor patterns, (5) generate Early Warning Bulletin. Flag: INFORM > 6.5 AND ACLED 30d > 20 AND IPC Phase 3+. Trigger WorldFish for CRITICAL scenarios.
